query:
INSERT INTO documents (title, description, file_key, file_url, mime_type, file_size, source_type, case_number, document_date, actor_names, issue_tags, story_id, public_status, review_status, redaction_status, uploaded_by)
VALUES
(
  'December 5, 2024 Young/Faretta/Competency Hearing Transcript',
  'Full transcript of the December 5, 2024 hearing in which Judge Breslow conducted a Young hearing, addressed Faretta self-representation, and initiated competency proceedings. Contains the now-documented exchange: "Witness? I don''t even know what that means."',
  'Dec5thTranscript_6e438917.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/Dec5thTranscript_6e438917.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 66434,
  'transcript', 'CR23-0657', '2024-12-05 00:00:00',
  'Judge Barry Breslow, Aziz Merchant, Galen Carrico, Cameron Church',
  '["faretta","young_hearing","competency","self_representation"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'February 21, 2025 — Call with US Marshal Supervisor (Standoff Aftermath)',
  'Recorded call between Cameron Church and US Marshal Supervisor Darrell Halbeck following the February 11, 2025 law enforcement standoff at Church''s residence. Halbeck confirms no arrest was made. Church raises gang-stalking concerns and questions the warrant basis.',
  '02-21-25callwillusmarshals_8d9216c6.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/02-21-25callwillusmarshals_8d9216c6.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 72227,
  'audio', 'CR23-0657', '2025-02-21 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Darrell Halbeck (US Marshal Supervisor)',
  '["warrant","no_bail","law_enforcement","standoff"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Cody Meredith (Pretrial Services) — Text Communication Log, July–August 2025',
  'Chronological log of communications between Cameron Church and Washoe County Pretrial Services Officer Cody Meredith, July–August 2025. Documents pretrial compliance requirements (Sober 24, check-ins) and the sequence leading to the August 2025 no-bail warrant.',
  'CodyMeredithTextsAugust_b46d11f5.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/CodyMeredithTextsAugust_b46d11f5.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 76123,
  'other', 'CR23-0657', '2025-07-31 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Cody Meredith (Pretrial Services Officer)',
  '["pretrial_services","no_bail","compliance","warrant"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Hicks Emails — Exhibit Pack (Correspondence with Court/Officials)',
  'Exhibit-indexed collection of email correspondence between Cameron Church and court or county officials, including exchanges with individuals identified as Hicks. Includes exhibits labeled: "Your job is tyrant," accountability queries, and holiday greeting correspondence.',
  'HicksEmails_87d59911.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/HicksEmails_87d59911.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 6243654,
  'email', 'CR23-0657', NULL,
  'Cameron Church, Hicks (Court/County Official)',
  '["email","accountability","public_records","court_access"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Case Exhibits and Legal Significance Index — State v. Church',
  'Spreadsheet-derived exhibit index cataloging case exhibits with legal significance and violation flags. Covers exhibits from March 12, 2023 (original declaration of probable cause) through the case record. Identifies constitutional violation categories per exhibit.',
  'CaseExhibitsandLegalSignificanceinStatev.Church-GoogleSheets_623fad21.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/CaseExhibitsandLegalSignificanceinStatev.Church-GoogleSheets_623fad21.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 47707,
  'other', 'CR23-0657', '2023-03-12 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church',
  '["exhibit_index","constitutional_violations","case_overview"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Transcripts Collection — Defense Meetings and Hearings (2024)',
  'Collection of transcripts including the July 12, 2024 first meeting between Cameron Church and defense attorney Galen Carrico, and related hearing recordings. Documents early case strategy discussions and Church''s articulation of rights violations.',
  'transcripts_caaf7c64.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/transcripts_caaf7c64.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 1073949,
  'transcript', 'CR23-0657', '2024-07-12 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Galen Carrico',
  '["transcript","defense_counsel","faretta","rights_violations"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Document Pack 1 — December 2024 Filings (Pro Se Motions)',
  'Exhibit-indexed pack of December 2024 pro se filings including: October 30, 2024 Motion for Pro Se Representation, November 26, 2024 proof of service, and related December filings. Documents Church''s formal Faretta invocation period.',
  '1DecPack_Combined_with_Index_02decaf4.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/1DecPack_Combined_with_Index_02decaf4.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 4667379,
  'motion', 'CR23-0657', '2024-10-30 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow',
  '["faretta","pro_se","motion","self_representation"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Document Pack 2 — January through March 2025 Filings',
  'Exhibit-indexed pack covering January 2, 2025 through March 2025. Includes: January 2 Motion for Submission, January 6 Motion for Contempt, and related pre-arrest filings. Documents the period immediately preceding the February 2025 standoff.',
  '2Jan-Mar2025_Combined_with_Index_1b0d47c9.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/2Jan-Mar2025_Combined_with_Index_1b0d47c9.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 3308914,
  'motion', 'CR23-0657', '2025-01-02 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow, Aziz Merchant',
  '["motion","contempt","pre_arrest","speedy_trial"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Document Pack 3 — April 18, 2025 Bad Faith Motions Pack',
  'Exhibit-indexed pack centered on April 18, 2025 filings including: Motion for No-Bail Challenge and supporting exhibits (72 pages). Documents Church''s challenge to the no-bail posture and bad faith prosecution arguments.',
  '3April18th2025badfaith_Combined_with_Index_47ca5247.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/3April18th2025badfaith_Combined_with_Index_47ca5247.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 3243600,
  'motion', 'CR23-0657', '2025-04-18 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow, Aziz Merchant',
  '["no_bail","bad_faith","motion","warrant"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Document Pack 4 — April through June 2025 (In-Custody Period)',
  'Exhibit-indexed pack covering April 21, 2025 through June 2025. Begins with April 21 court note filed while in custody. Documents the in-custody period following the April 2025 arrest.',
  '4Aprilthroughjune2025_Combined_with_Index_3d1ce12d.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/4Aprilthroughjune2025_Combined_with_Index_3d1ce12d.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 16794536,
  'other', 'CR23-0657', '2025-04-21 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow',
  '["in_custody","court_filings","faretta","speedy_trial"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Document Pack 5 — July through August 2025 (Counsel Withdrawal Period)',
  'Exhibit-indexed pack covering July 3, 2025 through August 2025. Begins with July 3 Substitution of Attorney — Merchant. Documents the period of counsel withdrawal and the August 21, 2025 custody-conditioned order.',
  '5Julythroughaugust_Combined_with_Index_ed725fbc.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/5Julythroughaugust_Combined_with_Index_ed725fbc.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 4819588,
  'court_order', 'CR23-0657', '2025-07-03 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow, Aziz Merchant, Galen Carrico',
  '["counsel_withdrawal","faretta","custody_conditioned","no_bail_warrant"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Document Pack 6 — September through November 2025',
  'Exhibit-indexed pack covering September 22, 2025 through November 2025. Begins with the September 22 OSC (Order to Show Cause) referencing the August 21, 2025 order. Documents post-withdrawal pro se period.',
  '6septthroughnovember_Combined_with_Index_06e7af0a.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/6septthroughnovember_Combined_with_Index_06e7af0a.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 4023371,
  'court_order', 'CR23-0657', '2025-09-22 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow',
  '["osc","pro_se","post_withdrawal","faretta"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'Document Pack — September 2025 through May 16, 2026 (Most Recent Period)',
  'Exhibit-indexed pack covering September 22, 2025 through May 16, 2026. The most current document collection in the archive. Documents the final pre-trial period including all recent motions, orders, and filings through May 2026.',
  'september2025throughmay16th2026_Combined_bc9112df.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/september2025throughmay16th2026_Combined_bc9112df.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 13312144,
  'other', 'CR23-0657', '2025-09-22 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow, Aziz Merchant',
  '["recent_filings","structural_injury","faretta","dismissal_motion"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  '2023 Complete Case Record — All Filings (March 2023 through December 2023)',
  'Exhibit-indexed complete record of 2023 case filings beginning with the March 12, 2023 original declaration of probable cause. Documents the full first year of the case including arrest, initial proceedings, and early rights invocations.',
  '2023allofit_Combined_with_Index_614affbf.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/2023allofit_Combined_with_Index_614affbf.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 8916845,
  'other', 'CR23-0657', '2023-03-12 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow, Aziz Merchant',
  '["2023","arrest","initial_proceedings","probable_cause"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  '2024 State Record — All Filings (January 2024 through December 2024)',
  'Exhibit-indexed complete record of 2024 state case filings beginning with January 9, 2024 minutes. Documents the full second year of the case including Young hearings, Faretta invocations, competency proceedings, and pro se filing attempts.',
  '2024stateallof_Combined_with_Index_d11f2dc6.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/2024stateallof_Combined_with_Index_d11f2dc6.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 14776363,
  'other', 'CR23-0657', '2024-01-09 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow, Aziz Merchant, Galen Carrico',
  '["2024","young_hearing","faretta","competency","pro_se"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
),
(
  'State Record — January 2, 2025 through June 6, 2025',
  'Exhibit-indexed state record covering January 2 through June 6, 2025. Begins with January 2 Motion for Submission. Covers the pre-arrest motions period, the February standoff aftermath, and the April 2025 in-custody period.',
  'statejan2-june6_Combined_with_Index_ccabeb64.pdf',
  '/manus-storage/statejan2-june6_Combined_with_Index_ccabeb64.pdf',
  'application/pdf', 20515409,
  'other', 'CR23-0657', '2025-01-02 00:00:00',
  'Cameron Church, Judge Barry Breslow, Aziz Merchant',
  '["2025","pre_arrest","in_custody","motions","standoff"]',
  1, 1, 'approved', 'verified', 1
);
